description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker image with a docker:dind service, define variables IMAGE_NAME as ${REGISTRY}/${CI_PROJECT_PATH}:${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME} and REGISTRY as registry.gitlab.com, and a single build stage. Add a build job named "build" that runs in the build stage, is limited to the master branch and tags, and executes the exact shell commands: docker build . -t ${IMAGE_NAME}, docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p ${CI_BUILD_TOKEN} ${REGISTRY}, docker push ${IMAGE_NAME}. No caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are configured.
